# SpiffRevOps

> Independent Spiff implementation consultancy run by Isma Delgado.
> Specialising in Spiff implementation, commission plan design, and 
> incentive compensation management for B2B SaaS companies.

## Key pages

- /: Homepage
- /case-study/storyblok/: Full case study — rebuilt Storyblok's Spiff 
  instance for 100+ reps across 8 currencies in 4 weeks
- /resources/: FAQ and guides on Spiff implementation
- /resources/spiff-implementation-checklist/: Pre-implementation checklist
- /resources/multi-currency-commission-plans-spiff/: Multi-currency guide
- /resources/accelerators-tiers-spiff/: Accelerators and tiers guide
- /resources/why-reps-dont-trust-commission-statements/: Trust and accuracy
